name: librust-crunchy-dev
title: librust-crunchy-dev
summary: Crunchy unroller: deterministically unroll constant loops - Rust source code
description:
Crunchy unroller: deterministically unroll constant loops - Rust source code
This package contains the source for the Rust crunchy crate, packaged by
debcargo for use with cargo and dh-cargo.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use librust-crunchy-dev because Crunchy unroller: deterministically unroll constant loops - Rust source code.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use librust-crunchy-dev as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair librust-crunchy-dev with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `librust-crunchy-dev --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
